calibration_source: Claude + Doc1 + Grok + Doc3 + Doc4 + Doc5 — 6-model arithmetic mean
reasoning: Unified weight file governing all 4 chart lines. base_weights = 6-model averaged calibration (Claude + 5 others, arithmetic mean). Forecast uses these weights with envelopes off. J6 uses these weights + j6_overrides + envelopes weighted 1.5x. DA inverts forecast. History is realized data. All four lines, one file.

j6_overrides._doc: Layered on top of base_weights when computing J6 line. Use same nested structure as base_weights, only include keys Jordan wants to override. Empty {} = J6 uses pure base. Every override requires reasoning + timestamp per Sprint 43 doctrine.

history.weights: none — actual measured Flow Cycle Index values
history.description: Historical line. Past = facts, no weighting.

forecast.description: Pure macro algorithm projection. Ignores bot envelopes. Uses 6-model averaged base_weights (replaces stale hardcoded weights).

da.description: Devil's Advocate — same-date inverse of forecast. No weights of its own.

j6.description: Jordan-curated line. Same projection engine as forecast but with j6_overrides layered on, AND bot envelopes weighted 1.5x. The empire's intel network expressed as a third opinion.

layer_balance_tuning.j6_bot_envelope_contribution_1.0: bots = forecast (J6 just different read on same data)
layer_balance_tuning.j6_bot_envelope_contribution_2.0: bots dominate 2:1 (J6 lives or dies by empire intel)
layer_balance_tuning.j6_bot_envelope_contribution_3.0: near-pure bot intel, forecast is sanity anchor

_meta.forecast_behavior_change_note: Forecast line uses 6-model averaged base_weights. This replaces the prior hardcoded weight table in flow_cycle.py (2.5/2.0/1.8 scale, pre-ETF tuned). There is no separate 'old vs new' forecast — the 6-model average IS the forecast. Going forward, all weight changes flow through this file.
